strengths: Roughly 20 years of hands-on software engineering (2006–present) across web, mobile, desktop, embedded and high-scale backend systems, exceeding the 15-year requirement
Currently building AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq — MCP code generators and frameworks for agentic workflows — direct, present-day fluency in the AI tooling the role targets

Founder of GISCollective (2016–present, adopted by Green Map) plus a track record of conference talks and multi-day workshops, evidencing the entrepreneurial drive and ability to inspire others the role demands
concerns: Career titles top out at Senior/Staff IC; no formal Director-level scope or organization-wide strategy ownership is documented
AI/ML depth is recent and tooling-centric — no advanced degree in an AI field and no large-scale shipped AI product cited
Advisory experience with strategic customers and partners, a core responsibility, is not explicitly evidenced on the resume

key_factors.factor: Breadth and depth of engineering experience
Hands-on AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work

response.justification: Bogdan brings the rare combination this role asks for: two decades of polyglot, full-stack engineering — including low-latency systems handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic — paired with current, hands-on work on AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generation and agentic frameworks. His nine-year run founding and operating GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform deployed on Kubernetes and used internationally by Green Map, is concrete evidence of the entrepreneurial, builder-led mindset the preferred qualifications call for, while his FOSS4G talk and multi-module courses show he can share insights and inspire practitioners externally. He meets the minimum qualifications outright, and his practical cloud fluency (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes) plus craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) position him to credibly partner with engineering teams on identifying and prototyping AI-driven differentiation.
